detaileddescription.para: @Returns Return true if successful, throws exception if compilation fails. Exception includes a detailed diagnostic.

memberdef.argsstring: (const double a, const double b) const
memberdef.name: Diff

detaileddescription.para: Get a vector of <name, value> pairs of all defined constants

briefdescription.para: Internal function to do a first pass of parsing to obtain variable names.

detaileddescription.para: @Synopsis EXPRTK does not have && and || but have 'and' and 'or' symbol. Replace && with 'and' and '||' with 'or'.
